violations.text: Deceased bird observed in back storage room. Carcass to be removed. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The doors to the outside (front automatic main entrance doors) are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2022
1 door reach-in freezer observed in poor repair. Equipment out of service prior to inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration units (retail sales floor and back storage room) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Refuse area and surrounding area was observed with an accumulation of litter and leaf accumulation. Areas to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

The floors in the back storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
